# Design Business Company

> Design Business Company (DBCo) is an independent design and technology studio led by Stewart Scott-Curran and Jordan Egstad. DBCo engineers brands, software, websites, and digital experiences for technology companies — partnering with teams including Anthropic, GitHub, Nike, Figma, Loom, Replit, Front, and Render.

DBCo works end to end: brand identity and design systems, marketing sites and product UI, and custom tooling including AI-assisted workflows. Engagements range from full brand builds to focused design-and-engineering partnerships. New project inquiries: business@dbco.online. Careers and portfolio submissions: jobs@dbco.online.

## Pages
- [Home](https://dbco.online/): studio overview and selected work
- [About](https://dbco.online/about/): the studio, its approach, and the people behind it
- [Contact](https://dbco.online/contact/): start a project — business@dbco.online
- [Tools](https://dbco.online/tools/): brand systems, AI tooling, and experiments

## Work
- Case studies and project pages are published at https://dbco.online/{slug}
- Selected clients: Anthropic, GitHub, Nike, Figma, Loom, Replit, Front, Render
